homepage.heroSubline: Reliable installation and repair services throughout the Twin Cities. We handle Minnesota's toughest weather, guaranteed.
homepage.aboutTitle: Your Trusted Garage Door Partner in Minneapolis
aboutText: A&J Garage and Home Service started with a simple goal: provide honest, reliable garage door services to our neighbors in Minneapolis. We're a family-owned business, built on hard work and a commitment to doing things right.

We believe in clear communication, upfront pricing, and quality workmanship. Our team takes pride in every job, whether it's a simple repair or a complete garage door installation. We treat your home like our own.

We're proud to be a part of the Minneapolis community. We actively support local initiatives and strive to give back whenever we can. When you choose A&J, you're supporting a local business that cares.

valueProps.title: Fast Response Times
valueProps.description: We understand garage door issues can be urgent. Expect prompt, reliable service when you call.

valueProps.title: Experienced Technicians
valueProps.description: Our team has years of experience handling all types of garage door problems, big or small.

valueProps.title: Upfront Pricing
valueProps.description: No hidden fees or surprises. We provide clear, detailed estimates before any work begins.

valueProps.title: Quality Materials
valueProps.description: We use only the best materials from trusted brands to ensure long-lasting performance.

homepage.ctaHeadline: Get Your Free Garage Door Quote Today!
homepage.ctaSubline: Call us now for fast, reliable service in Minneapolis and the surrounding areas.

services.name: Garage Door Installation
services.shortDescription: Expert garage door installation for new homes and replacements in Minneapolis.
services.description:
Installing a new garage door is a significant investment. A&J Garage and Home Service provides professional installation services tailored to your specific needs and budget. We handle everything from selecting the right door to ensuring a perfect, secure fit.

We work with all types of garage doors, including traditional steel doors, insulated doors for energy efficiency, and custom wood doors to match the unique architecture of Minneapolis homes. We consider the harsh Minnesota climate, recommending doors and hardware that can withstand extreme temperatures and heavy snow loads.

Our installation process includes removing the old door, preparing the opening, installing the new door and all necessary hardware, and testing the door's operation to ensure smooth and reliable performance. We also handle the disposal of the old door, leaving your property clean and tidy. We properly seal and insulate to keep the cold out during the long winters.
process: Step 1: Consultation and Door Selection
Step 2: Precise Measurements and Preparation
Step 3: Professional Installation of Door and Hardware
Step 4: Thorough Testing and Quality Check

faq.question: How long does garage door installation take?
faq.answer: Typically, a standard garage door installation takes between 4-6 hours. However, this can vary depending on the complexity of the installation and the type of door.

faq.question: Do you offer a warranty on your installations?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer a comprehensive warranty on all our installations, covering both the door and the installation workmanship. Details of the warranty will be provided during the consultation.

faq.question: Can you install custom garage doors?
faq.answer: Absolutely! We specialize in custom garage door installations. We'll work with you to select the perfect door to match your home's style and your personal preferences.

services.name: Garage Door Repair
services.shortDescription: Fast, reliable garage door repair services throughout Minneapolis and the metro area.
services.description:
A malfunctioning garage door can be a major inconvenience and a security risk. A&J Garage and Home Service offers prompt and reliable garage door repair services to get your door back in working order quickly. We handle all types of repairs, from broken springs and cables to malfunctioning openers and damaged panels.

Our experienced technicians arrive equipped with the tools and parts necessary to diagnose and repair most problems on the spot. We understand the unique challenges posed by Minneapolis's harsh winters, including frozen doors, damaged tracks, and opener malfunctions caused by extreme cold. We know how to fix it, and fix it fast.

We provide transparent pricing and explain the repair process clearly before starting any work. We use high-quality replacement parts to ensure long-lasting repairs and prevent future problems. We'll recommend the best solution for your specific situation, whether it's a simple repair or a complete replacement.
process: Step 1: Thorough Inspection and Diagnosis
Step 2: Clear Explanation of Repair Options
Step 3: Professional Repair Using Quality Parts
Step 4: Testing and Verification of Proper Operation
benefits: Extend the Life of Your Garage Door

faq.question: How much does a typical garage door repair cost?
faq.answer: The cost of a garage door repair varies depending on the nature of the problem. We offer free estimates to provide you with an accurate and upfront price.

faq.question: Do you offer emergency repair services?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer 24/7 emergency repair services throughout Minneapolis. Call us anytime for immediate assistance.

faq.question: How long will the repair take?
faq.answer: Most repairs can be completed within an hour or two. More complex repairs may take longer, but we'll provide you with an estimated timeframe before starting work.

services.name: Garage Door Opener Repair & Installation
services.shortDescription: Minneapolis's trusted experts for garage door opener repair, replacement, and installation.
services.description:
Is your garage door opener noisy, unreliable, or completely unresponsive? A&J Garage and Home Service specializes in garage door opener repair and installation. We work with all major brands and models, and we can quickly diagnose and fix any opener problem.

We offer a wide range of opener services, including repairing broken motors, replacing worn gears, reprogramming remotes, and installing new safety sensors. We also install new garage door openers, including smart openers with Wi-Fi connectivity and smartphone control. We will ensure proper safety settings to protect your family and property.

We understand the importance of a properly functioning garage door opener for your convenience and security. Our technicians are trained to handle all types of opener issues, and we use only high-quality replacement parts to ensure long-lasting performance. We will ensure proper safety settings to protect your family and property.
process: Step 1: Diagnose Opener Malfunction
Step 2: Repair or Replace Components
Step 3: Install New Opener (if needed)
Step 4: Program Remotes and Test Safety Features

faq.question: How do I know if my garage door opener needs repair or replacement?
faq.answer: Common signs include loud noises, slow operation, intermittent failures, and unresponsive remotes. If you're experiencing these issues, give us a call for a professional assessment.

faq.question: Can you install a smart garage door opener?
faq.answer: Yes, we specialize in smart garage door opener installations. We can help you choose the right model for your needs and integrate it with your existing smart home system.

faq.question: Are new garage door openers safer?
faq.answer: Newer models have advanced safety features, like rolling codes and automatic reversal systems, which can prevent accidents and improve security.

services.name: Garage Door Spring Replacement
services.shortDescription: Expert garage door spring replacement services in Minneapolis – fast and safe.
services.description:
Garage door springs are under immense tension and can be dangerous to handle without the proper tools and experience. A&J Garage and Home Service provides safe and reliable garage door spring replacement services throughout Minneapolis. We replace both torsion springs and extension springs, using only high-quality springs designed for the specific weight and size of your door.

Broken springs are a common cause of garage door malfunctions, and it's important to replace them promptly to prevent further damage to the door and opener. Our technicians are trained to safely remove the old springs and install new ones, ensuring proper balance and smooth operation. We work quickly and efficiently to minimize disruption to your daily routine.

We offer competitive pricing and a warranty on our spring replacements. Don't risk injury by attempting to replace garage door springs yourself – call the professionals at A&J Garage and Home Service for safe and reliable service.
process: Step 1: Assess Spring Type and Door Weight
Step 2: Safely Remove Broken Springs
Step 3: Install New, High-Quality Springs
Step 4: Balance Door and Test Operation

faq.question: How long do garage door springs last?
faq.answer: The lifespan of garage door springs varies depending on usage, but typically ranges from 5-10 years. Regular maintenance can help extend their lifespan.

faq.question: How do I know if my garage door spring is broken?
faq.answer: Common signs include a loud snapping sound, a door that is difficult to open or close, or a door that hangs unevenly. Never try to open or close the door if you suspect a broken spring.

faq.question: Are there different types of garage door springs?
faq.answer: Yes, the two main types are torsion springs (mounted above the door) and extension springs (mounted on the sides of the door). We are experienced in replacing both types.

services.name: Garage Door Cable Repair
services.shortDescription: Minneapolis experts in garage door cable repair and replacement for smooth, safe operation.
services.description:
Garage door cables play a crucial role in the smooth and safe operation of your garage door. If a cable is frayed, broken, or has come off the drum, it can cause the door to become unbalanced or even completely inoperable. A&J Garage and Home Service offers professional garage door cable repair and replacement services in Minneapolis.

Our experienced technicians can quickly diagnose cable problems and provide the necessary repairs. We use high-quality replacement cables that are designed to withstand the stress and strain of daily use. We ensure that the cables are properly tensioned and secured to the drum and bottom brackets, ensuring smooth and safe operation.

Attempting to repair or replace garage door cables yourself can be dangerous. The cables are under high tension and can cause serious injury if not handled properly. Call the professionals at A&J Garage and Home Service for safe and reliable cable repair services.
process: Step 1: Inspect Cables for Damage or Wear
Step 2: Safely Release Tension on Springs
Step 3: Replace Damaged Cables with High-Quality Replacements
Step 4: Properly Tension and Secure Cables

faq.question: What causes garage door cables to break?
faq.answer: Common causes include wear and tear, corrosion, and improper maintenance. Regular lubrication can help extend the lifespan of your cables.

faq.question: How often should I inspect my garage door cables?
faq.answer: We recommend inspecting your garage door cables at least twice a year, or more frequently if you use your garage door multiple times a day.

faq.question: Can I replace a garage door cable myself?
faq.answer: We strongly advise against attempting to replace garage door cables yourself due to the high tension involved. Call a professional for safe and reliable service.

services.name: Garage Door Maintenance
services.shortDescription: Keep your garage door running smoothly with our Minneapolis garage door maintenance services.
services.description:
Regular maintenance is essential for keeping your garage door operating smoothly and reliably. A&J Garage and Home Service offers comprehensive garage door maintenance services throughout Minneapolis. Our maintenance service includes a thorough inspection of all components, including springs, cables, rollers, hinges, and opener.

We lubricate all moving parts to reduce friction and prevent wear and tear. We also adjust the spring tension to ensure proper balance and smooth operation. We inspect the safety sensors and make sure they are functioning correctly. We will advise you on any potential issues and recommend necessary repairs before they become major problems.

Regular maintenance can extend the lifespan of your garage door and prevent costly repairs. Contact A&J Garage and Home Service today to schedule your garage door maintenance service.
process: Step 1: Thorough Inspection of All Components
Step 2: Lubricate Moving Parts
Step 3: Adjust Spring Tension
Step 4: Test Safety Sensors

faq.question: How often should I have my garage door serviced?
faq.answer: We recommend having your garage door serviced at least once a year, or more frequently if you use your garage door multiple times a day.

faq.question: What is included in a garage door maintenance service?
faq.answer: Our maintenance service includes a thorough inspection, lubrication of moving parts, spring tension adjustment, and safety sensor testing.

faq.question: Can I perform some maintenance tasks myself?
faq.answer: Yes, you can lubricate the rollers and hinges yourself. However, we recommend leaving spring adjustments and other complex tasks to a professional.

services.name: Emergency Garage Door Services
services.shortDescription: 24/7 emergency garage door repair services in Minneapolis when you need us most.
services.description:
A garage door emergency can happen at any time, leaving your home vulnerable to security risks or trapping your car inside. A&J Garage and Home Service offers 24/7 emergency garage door repair services throughout Minneapolis. We understand the urgency of these situations and respond quickly to get your door back in working order.

Whether it's a broken spring, a malfunctioning opener, or a door that's been damaged in an accident, our experienced technicians are available around the clock to provide prompt and reliable repairs. We arrive equipped with the tools and parts necessary to handle most emergencies on the spot. We prioritize safety and security, ensuring that your home is protected.

Don't hesitate to call A&J Garage and Home Service anytime, day or night, for emergency garage door services. We're here to help you when you need us most, especially during the brutal winter months when a broken garage door can be a real crisis.
process: Step 1: Immediate Response to Your Call
Step 2: Rapid On-Site Assessment
Step 3: Efficient Repair or Temporary Solution
Step 4: Ensure Security and Safety

faq.question: What constitutes a garage door emergency?
faq.answer: A garage door emergency includes any situation that compromises your home's security, prevents you from accessing your garage, or poses a safety risk.

faq.question: How quickly can you respond to an emergency call?
faq.answer: We strive to respond to emergency calls within 1-2 hours, depending on your location and our current workload.

faq.question: What if you can't fix the problem immediately?
faq.answer: If we can't fix the problem immediately, we'll provide a temporary solution to secure your garage and schedule a follow-up appointment for a permanent repair.

reviews.name: Sarah M.
reviews.text: A&J Garage came out the same day I called when my garage door spring broke. The technician, Mike, was professional and efficient. He explained everything clearly and replaced the spring quickly. Great service!

reviews.name: David K.
reviews.text: My garage door opener was making a terrible grinding noise. A&J Garage diagnosed the problem quickly and replaced a worn gear. The repair was done efficiently, and the door is now working quietly. Minor complaint, they were about 30 minutes late for the appt.

reviews.name: Emily S.
reviews.text: We recently had A&J Garage install a new insulated garage door. The installation team was professional and courteous. They did an excellent job and cleaned up everything afterwards. Our garage is noticeably warmer now!

reviews.name: Tom B.
reviews.text: One of my garage door cables snapped, and I couldn't get the door to close. A&J Garage responded quickly and fixed the problem within an hour. The technician was knowledgeable and friendly. Highly recommended!

reviews.name: Lisa P.
reviews.text: I had A&J Garage perform a maintenance check on my garage door. The technician lubricated all the moving parts and adjusted the spring tension. The door is now running much smoother. Good preventative service.

reviews.name: Robert L.
reviews.text: Our garage door wouldn't close on a Friday night, and we were worried about security. A&J Garage came out within an hour and fixed the problem. Amazing response time and excellent service.
